summary: Frontend-only regression test for the Web Console button fix on ClientOverviewPage > Dispositivi tab. The fix moved openConsoleWithVpn into DevicesTab so useWebConsoleTabs() is in scope. All test cases PASS on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844): button renders, click opens web-console-active modal, POST /api/web-console/session is fired, no ReferenceError in console. Info button (DeviceInfoCard) also works without regression.
critical_code_review_comments: ClientOverviewPage.js: openConsoleWithVpn correctly placed inside DevicesTab (line ~916) where const webConsole = useWebConsoleTabs() is defined (line 909). Scope issue resolved.

Click flow validated: button at line ~1067 (data-testid=web-console-btn-<ip>) -> openConsoleWithVpn(d) -> webConsole.open(clientId, ip, port) -> POST /api/web-console/session -> WebConsoleActive modal renders with data-testid=web-console-active.
No ReferenceError captured in browser console after click on either viewport size.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 86BIT_Office client (da3d6e40-b3e5-4d46-9787-dde328a3aa36) which has 14 devices, 10 of which expose web-console-btn (firewall/switch/router/etc).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web Console button fix verified working. Pattern: 14 devices in 86BIT_Office client; 10 have web-console-btn-<ip> testids (e.g. 192.168.1.3, 10.100.61.220). Clicking opens dock/modal with data-testid=web-console-active and fires POST /api/web-console/session. After click expect 'Caricamento device...' loading state since this preview environment has no real connector proxy (504 from backend is acceptable per main agent note). Info button opens DeviceInfoCard (data-testid=device-info-card) — verified working as overlay dialog.

desktop_1920x1080.web_console_buttons_visible: PASS - 10 web-console-btn-<ip> rendered for online firewall/switch/router/etc
desktop_1920x1080.no_reference_error: PASS - 0 ReferenceError captured in browser console
desktop_1920x1080.info_button_no_regression: PASS - device-info-<ip> click opens DeviceInfoCard (data-testid=device-info-card) populated with device data (Zyxel-Test, ONLINE, Cliente: 86BIT_Office, etc)
